jobs.title: Machine Learning Engineer (Python)
jobs.description: Build and deploy machine learning models in Python. You will own MLOps pipelines, serve models behind FastAPI, and fine-tune LLM systems in PyTorch.
jobs.note: Dense keyword overlap, fully remote, exactly the target role

jobs.title: LLM Platform Engineer
jobs.description: Design retrieval pipelines and evaluation harnesses for LLM products. Strong Python required; we deploy with FastAPI and track experiments with MLOps tooling.
jobs.note: LLM-focused platform work with the core stack

jobs.title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer
jobs.description: Lead machine learning projects end to end: data pipelines, PyTorch training, and production serving in Python. Remote-first team.
jobs.note: Senior variant of the target role, remote-first

jobs.title: MLOps Engineer
jobs.description: Own the model lifecycle: CI/CD for machine learning, feature stores, monitoring, and Python automation across training and serving.
jobs.note: MLOps specialization still squarely in scope

jobs.title: Applied AI Engineer
jobs.description: Ship LLM features to production: prompt pipelines, evaluations, and FastAPI services in Python.
jobs.note: Applied LLM engineering with the exact stack

jobs.title: Machine Learning Engineer, NLP
jobs.description: Train and evaluate transformer models in PyTorch, build Python data tooling, and deploy inference services.
jobs.note: NLP flavor of the target role

jobs.title: AI Infrastructure Engineer (Python)
jobs.description: Scale LLM inference and machine learning training clusters. Python, PyTorch, and strong MLOps practices.
